'''sayafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatromathematics|iatromathematics]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatromathematics|iatromathematics]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sayafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæyæfæth|sæyæfæth]] || [[word:sæyæfæj|sæyæfæj]] || [[word:sæyæfæsh|sæyæfæsh]] || [[word:sæyæfæ|sæyæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sayayafath|sayayafath]] || [[word:sayayafaj|sayayafaj]] || [[word:sayayafash|sayayafash]] || [[word:sayayafa|sayayafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sayafath|sayafath]] || [[word:sayafaj|sayafaj]] || [[word:sayafash|sayafash]] || [[word:sayafa|sayafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sayaffafth|sayaffafth]] || [[word:sayaffafj|sayaffafj]] || [[word:sayaffafsh|sayaffafsh]] || [[word:sayaffaf|sayaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sayafatha|sayafatha]] || [[word:sayafaja|sayafaja]] || [[word:sayafasha|sayafasha]] || [[word:sayafaka|sayafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sayafath|sayafath]] || [[word:sayafaj|sayafaj]] || [[word:sayafash|sayafash]] || [[word:sayafa|sayafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sayafathal|sayafathal]] || [[word:sayafajal|sayafajal]] || [[word:sayafashal|sayafashal]] || [[word:sayafakal|sayafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sayafaathatha|sayafaathatha]] || [[word:sayafaajaja|sayafaajaja]] || [[word:sayafaashasha|sayafaashasha]] || [[word:sayafaaka|sayafaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sayafathan|sayafathan]] || [[word:sayafajan|sayafajan]] || [[word:sayafashan|sayafashan]] || [[word:sayafakan|sayafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sayafathaoro|sayafathaoro]] || [[word:sayafajaoro|sayafajaoro]] || [[word:sayafashaoro|sayafashaoro]] || [[word:sayafakaoro|sayafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
